gh-issue.description: Pick up a GitHub issue: description, comments, images downloaded locally, linked PRs — everything to start working.

gh-pr.description: Review a pull request: branch, checks, reviews/approval, linked issue, diff stat, comments — the full dashboard. :status = slim merge-state only (~250B, fits hook cache).

gh-run.description: What passed, what failed? Workflow run jobs with statuses and failed step names.

gh-job.description: Why did this job fail? PR context + error pattern search + log tail — the actual error, not setup noise.

gh-follow.description: Follow a GitHub user via the authenticated gh CLI session.

gh-following.description: List users you follow on GitHub.

gh-batch-follow.description: Follow each username from a file (one per line, '#' comments). Sleeps 1s between calls.

gh-star.description: Star a GitHub repository via gh CLI.

gh-batch-star.description: Star each OWNER/REPO from a file (one per line, '#' comments). Sleeps 1s between calls.

gh-find-followable.description: Discover candidate users to follow: pulls stargazers + contributors of a repo, dedupes, filters out orgs. Pipe to a file then review before gh-batch-follow.

gh-find-starable.description: Discover repos worth starring by topic. Pulls top N repos for the topic, sorted by stars. Pipe to a file then review before gh-batch-star.
